title: Vastus Lateralis Muscle, HV, Baseline [MECFS_101]
characteristics_ch1: tissue: Muscle | Sex: Male | subject status: healthy volunteer (HV)

title: Patient #312
extract_protocol_ch1: Serum samples were assayed at three dilutions (40%, 1%, and 0.005%) with each sample dilution added to a corresponding subset of the 1,305 SOMAmer detection reagents binned according to manufacturer’s predicted target abundance in serum. Cerebrospinal fluid was run at a single 15% concentration dilution with protease inhibitors and polyanionic competitor reagent added.
data_processing: Data processing was performed according to manufacturers instructions for the SOMAscan Assay v3.2 standard protocol (SomaLogic, Boulder, CO, USA).  In brief, systematic effects on the data introduced during the hybridization step were corrected followed by median normalization (i.e., hybNorm.plateScale.medNorm).
label_protocol_ch1: Labeling was performed according to manufacturers instructions for the SOMAscan Assay v3.2 standard protocol (SomaLogic, Boulder, CO, USA).
hyb_protocol: Hypbridization was performed according to manufacturers instructions for the SOMAscan Assay v3.2 standard protocol (SomaLogic, Boulder, CO, USA).
scan_protocol: Scanning was performed according to manufacturers instructions for the SOMAscan Assay v3.2 standard protocol (SomaLogic, Boulder, CO, USA).

data_processing: Data processing was performed according to manufacturers instructions for the SOMAscan Assay v3.2 standard protocol (SomaLogic, Boulder, CO, USA).  In brief, systematic effects on the data introduced during the hybridization step were corrected followed by median normalization (i.e., hybNorm.plateScale.medNorm).
label_protocol_ch1: Labeling was performed according to manufacturers instructions for the SOMAscan Assay v3.2 standard protocol (SomaLogic, Boulder, CO, USA).
hyb_protocol: Hypbridization was performed according to manufacturers instructions for the SOMAscan Assay v3.2 standard protocol (SomaLogic, Boulder, CO, USA).
scan_protocol: Scanning was performed according to manufacturers instructions for the SOMAscan Assay v3.2 standard protocol (SomaLogic, Boulder, CO, USA).

title: Peripheral Blood Mononuclear Cells, HV, Baseline MECFS_103
extract_protocol_ch1: RNA was extracted from PBMC’s of participants using miRNeasy Micro Kit (QIAGEN). | Dual index libraries were constructed with at least one unique index per each patient library using the TruSeq Stranded Total RNA HT Kit (Illumina).
data_processing: Illuminasoftware bcl2fastq v.2.17 | RNA sequences were subjected to quality control  through FastQC: http://www.bioinformatics.babraham.ac.uk/projects/fastqc | Adapters were removed using Trimmomatic: https://github.com/timflutre/trimmomatic | Alignment to the human genome (GRCh38) using STAR | Gene expression levels were quantified using FeaturesCounts | Assembly: GRCh38 | Supplementary files format and content: tab-delimited text files include gene expression levels for each sample
